business_goal: reverseProxyURL always returns a playable URL and every fallback to origin emits one distinct, cause-naming console warning (PROVIDER_MISSING / SERVER_NOT_STARTED / SERVER_START_FAILED / APP_BACKGROUNDED / INVALID_URL / UNSUPPORTED_URL) — the generic 'invalid url or port' is retired (fixes issue #8; UC-ResolvePlaybackUrl, breadboard N7/N8/U3, slice V3).
